label: AppleScript • live identifier fidelity via {{target}}
query: Set the body of the provided note to the provided body.
notes: Capability lane for identifier fidelity — the class of failure that made the liveProof run mistype 'Osaurus Eval Scratch'. The exact note name is supplied as the {{target}} literal (not in the task text) and the body as {{body}}. Scores that the real 16B routed the identifier THROUGH its placeholder (mustUsePlaceholders proves it did not re-type the name) and set the body on that note (Grok rubric). Mock 'app world' answers so there are no side effects. Skips when no AppleScript model is installed.

rubric: The AppleScript sets the body of the note whose name is the provided target, matching that exact name rather than a different, shortened, or approximated name.
The script uses the provided body as the note's body and targets the Notes application.
